context: The solution must scan a legal contract for four distinct categories of broken automatic numbering: sub-clause resets mid-document, duplicate clause numbers, skipped clause numbers, and phantom clauses created by empty list items. Each detected error must be reported with its type and location.

checklist.name: Reset detection
checklist.description: Detects sub-clause numbering that resets mid-document

checklist.name: Skip detection
checklist.description: Identifies gaps/skipped numbers in sequential numbering

checklist.name: Phantom clause detection
checklist.description: Identifies empty list items creating phantom numbers
